c.d: The range and diversity of live streaming content available on the platform, including genres like sports, gaming, entertainment, and news.
The ease of navigation, design quality, and overall user experience provided by the app.
The monthly or annual fee required to access the app's content and features.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, tablets, smart TVs) on which the app can be used.
Extra functionalities such as cloud DVR, multi-stream capabilities, and offline viewing options.
